message:
✨ Make recommendation reasons more visible (#1500)

- Add context subtitle under section header explaining why results appear
- Without cluster: 'Showing popular CNCF solutions — connect a cluster for personalized'
- With cluster: 'Matched based on your cluster resources, labels, and issues'
- Match reasons now display as colored pill badges (blue for community, green for cluster match)
- Much more visible than the previous muted inline text

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
